Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Europe's Natural Wonders - Slovenia
programme.desc: Journey into a landscape of alpine wonder and crystal-clear waters. From the iconic, mist-covered island of Lake Bled to the thunderous, turquoise rapids of the Soča River, this film explores the pristine beauty of Slovenia’s Julian Alps. Witness the sunlight filtering through ancient beech forests and the quiet majesty of limestone peaks in a cinematic tribute to one of Europe’s best-kept natural secrets.

programme.title: Meditating in Winter

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: Point Reyes National Seashore & Oregon Coast Sea Stacks

Feel your worries melt away, your heart rate slow, and breath deepen with each relaxing scene.

programme.title: Fjords & Waterfalls of Norway
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring waterfalls and fjords of Norway in this 90 minute relaxing nature film. Glimpse historic fishing villages accessible only by boat and relax to the calming soundtrack that accompanies the inspiring scenery.

programme.title: The Scoop
programme.desc: On this episode of The Scoop we recap Week 5 of the PLL! Connor Shellenberger rallied the reigning champs to a 2-0 homecoming weekend, Jared Valluzzi joins the show live from Long Island to recap the wins, and we caught up with Inside Lacrosse’s Chris Rosenthall to break down the rest of the weekend across the PLL and WLL.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: On Episode 17 of Season 3 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show, Matt Rambo joins the guys to talk about his move to the New York Atlas, how he’s encouraged Connor Shellenberger, and what it was like to beat old friend Colin Heacock… who he promptly FaceTimed onto the show. Mitchell and the guys broke down the PLL weekend on Long Island, Asher Nolting’s release from the Boston Cannons, and updates in the college lacrosse world including Lars Tiffany’s lawsuit, Ohio State’s assistant coaching carousel, and Richmond's massive donation.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for $1 million dollars continues as three players remain.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: And then there were two! Prepare for a roller coaster heads up battle as we bring you the conclusion of the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. A starting field of 2010 entrants has narrowed to the final two. Players claimed their share of the $6.4 million dollar prize pool along the way, but our final two players hope to be crowned the ultimate victor, taking home the first place prize of $1 million dollars and having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: From HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada it’s the WPT Choctaw Final Table where the final six players are competing for the top prize of $486,600 and the title of WPT Champion. Ray Qartomy and Chance Kornuth find themselves in familiar territory as this final table marks the fifth WPT final table appearance for Qartomy and the third for Kornuth. James Hundt Jr will compete at his first WPT final table alongside fan favorite Steve “Cuz” Buckner, poker pro Kristen Foxen, and James Mackey who won this very event in season 15.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Four players remain in the battle for WPT Choctaw Champion. Steve “Cuz” Buckner is fired up and determined to find a way to win his first WPT Title. He is breaking out big bluffs backed by some big talk in hopes of outwitting his final three opponents. Tune in for more WPT Tournament action.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for first continues at HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada as our four remaining players hope to become a WPT Champion and leave with the first place prize of $486,600. An exciting spectacle so far, the WPT Choctaw final table has even more to offer. Don’t miss James Hundt, Ray Qartomy, Chance Kornuth, and Steve “Cuz” Buckner play for nearly half a million dollars with a WPT Title on the line.
